title: Delicious Crispy Italian Bread Flatbread
description: This flatbread is crisp and flavorful, with a tangy plum sauce and fermented‑jang glaze. It pairs wonderfully with a cedar‑plank serving for a Tuscan twist.
instructions: In a bowl combine flour, salt, sugar, and instant yeast.
Add warm water and olive oil; mix until dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 4 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise for 20 minutes until doubled.
Preheat a cedar plank over medium heat until hot, about 5 minutes.
Punch down the dough and roll it into a 12-inch circle on a floured surface.
Brush the dough with plum sauce, then sprinkle fermented‑jang, oregano, and basil.
Transfer the dough to the cedar plank and bake for 8 minutes until crisp.
Remove from heat, let cool for 2 minutes, then slice into wedges.
Serve warm as a kid‑friendly snack or side.
